Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /Users/nacho/Decentraland/real-state-analyzer/data/analyzer.db "SELECT neighborhood, COUNT\(*\) AS n_rentals, ROUND\(AVG\(price_usd / homogenized_m2\), 1\) AS avg_rent_per_m2 FROM listings WHERE active=1 AND operation='alquiler' AND rooms=3 AND price_usd > 0 AND homogenized_m2 > 0 AND neighborhood IN \('nunez', 'lomas-de-nunez'\) GROUP BY neighborhood;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /Users/nacho/Decentraland/real-state-analyzer/data/analyzer.db "SELECT has_pool, has_garage, COUNT\(*\) AS n, ROUND\(AVG\(price_usd / homogenized_m2\), 1\) AS avg_rent_per_m2, ROUND\(\(SELECT price_usd/homogenized_m2 FROM listings WHERE neighborhood='nunez' AND operation='alquiler' AND rooms=3 AND age_band='a-estrenar' AND active=1 ORDER BY price_usd/homogenized_m2 LIMIT 1 OFFSET COUNT\(*\)/2\), 1\) AS median FROM listings WHERE active=1 AND operation='alquiler' AND rooms=3 AND age_band='a-estrenar' AND neighborhood='nunez' GROUP BY has_pool, has_garage ORDER BY n DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /Users/nacho/Decentraland/real-state-analyzer/data/analyzer.db "SELECT rooms, age_band, has_pool, has_garage, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM listings WHERE active=1 AND operation='alquiler' AND sub_zone='89c2e30254bffff' GROUP BY rooms, age_band, has_pool, has_garage;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /Users/nacho/Decentraland/real-state-analyzer/data/analyzer.db "SELECT has_pool, has_garage, COUNT\(*\) AS n, ROUND\(AVG\(price_usd / homogenized_m2\), 1\) AS avg_per_m2 FROM listings WHERE active=1 AND operation='alquiler' AND rooms=3 AND age_band='a-estrenar' AND neighborhood='nunez' GROUP BY has_pool, has_garage;")
